race.description: Pickled Sisters Cafe, Rutherglen Mdn Plate
race.comment: ELSISI (1) looking for this trip and further now after resuming with a narrow fifth over 1175m at Albury. Gets a better set-up today and has genuine each way claims. OUBAITORI (9) deep into the prep and strips fitter after contesting a handy race when fifth over 1400m at Albury. Will need a good ride from the gate and assess on her good third here three-back. SECOND WITNESS (12) finds a fairly average race today and gets in light with Button's claim. Should get the trip and take a hand in the finish. PRINCESS PRUSSIA (10) finds the maiden win elusive but it certainly hasn't been without trying. Draws well and is worth keeping in mind.
